manifest.title: Week 1 — Signal Spine Sample Fact Manifest
manifest.description: Five manually selected real event samples for week 1 post-event price backfill validation. All samples are real broadcast events from 2026-05-25 with no fabricated data.
manifest.t0_policy: broadcast_time_utc is used as t0. event_time_utc is null because the actual event occurrence time is unknown. t0_basis is explicitly 'broadcast_time'.

price_provider_defaults.macro_fallback: Macro events (WTI, CPI, etc.) do NOT request the macro asset. Only BTC/ETH benchmarks are backfilled using Binance Kline 1m.

quality_notes: No fabricated original publish times — event_time_utc is null for all samples
No fabricated second verification sources — source_count is honestly 1 for all samples
No price data is pre-filled — only provider plans are documented
No causal judgments are made — all observations are post-event price backfill candidates
No existing manual conclusions are modified — existing_decision preserves original human assessment
Unknown fields are explicitly marked as null or 'unknown'

samples.title: Loracle HYPE空单浮亏扩大，持仓规模达1.13亿美元
samples.raw_summary: 巨鲸 Loracle 在 HyperLiquid 上的 HYPE 空单浮亏持续扩大，当前持仓规模约 1.13 亿美元。地址层面数据由币界快讯 AI 通过 HyperLiquid 公开地址数据监控获取。
samples.source_label: 币界快讯ai / HyperLiquid 地址数据
samples.price_provider_plan: Hyperliquid candleSnapshot, 15m interval. HYPE is not listed on Binance — Hyperliquid's native API is the only viable source. Note: candleSnapshot may have different OHLC semantics from Binance klines.
known_limitations: Hyperliquid candleSnapshot API may have different availability than Binance klines
15m interval means t0 precision is ±7.5 minutes vs 1m kline precision of ±30 seconds
No cross-exchange price verification possible for HYPE
单一来源，缺乏交叉验证
播报时间代替事件发生时间——实际开仓时间可能早于播报数小时
samples.manual_review_notes: Loracle 是已知巨鲸地址。需要确认 Hyperliquid candleSnapshot 在选定时间范围内是否返回数据。如果 snapshot 不可用，可考虑 DexScreener 或 Hyperliquid 的 REST API 作为备选。

samples.title: 麻吉黄立成增持ETH多单921.47枚，清算价接近现价
samples.raw_summary: 麻吉大哥（黄立成，Machi Big Brother）在 HyperLiquid 增持 ETH 多单 921.47 枚，当前清算价接近 ETH 市价，存在较高清算风险。地址数据来自 HyperLiquid 公开查询。
samples.source_label: 币界快讯ai / HyperLiquid 地址数据
samples.price_provider_plan: Binance Kline, 1m interval (ETHUSDT). ETH is listed on Binance with deep liquidity, no alternative provider needed.
known_limitations: 清算价接近现价意味着价格小幅波动即可能触发清算——但归因分析无法判断因果关系
播报时间代替事件发生时间——增持操作可能早于播报完成
单一来源，清算数据来自 HyperLiquid 头寸查询，无法从其他平台验证
samples.manual_review_notes: Machi Big Brother 是知名链上地址。ETH 有充足的 Binance kline 数据。t0 选择播报时间 vs 实际增持时间的差异需要在后续归因中评估影响。

samples.title: Binance近10天BTC流入显著增加，比特币面临卖出信号
samples.raw_summary: Binance 交易所过去 10 天 BTC 净流入显著增加，链上数据显示大量 BTC 正向交易所移动，被分析师解读为潜在卖出信号。数据来自 Darkfost 分析。
samples.source_quality_status: 单来源，分析类内容不可独立验证
samples.price_provider_plan: Binance Kline, 1m interval (BTCUSDT). BTC is listed on Binance with ample liquidity.
known_limitations: 这是分析类内容而非硬新闻——'卖出信号'是 Darkfost 的主观解读
BTC 流入交易所是持续 10 天的趋势，不是单点事件，t0 选择播报时间可能不反映趋势起点
单一来源，虽来源名称为分析机构但无独立第二来源
现有人工结论已将其评为 low news_quality，符合分析类内容特征
samples.manual_review_notes: 此样本的 existing_news_quality=low 是正确的——分析解读不应与硬新闻同等对待。价格回填的 1h/4h/24h 窗口可能不足以捕捉 10 天趋势的完整影响。

samples.title: Strategy本周暂停比特币购买，转而回购可转换债务
samples.raw_summary: Strategy（原 MicroStrategy）本周暂停了比特币购买计划，转而回购其可转换债务。这一转变被市场解读为机构需求可能放缓的信号。
samples.source_label: 币界快讯ai / Strategy相关消息
samples.source_quality_status: 单来源，但公司公告可交叉验证
samples.price_provider_plan: Binance Kline, 1m interval (BTCUSDT). Use BTCUSDT for target price and BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT benchmarks.
known_limitations: Strategy 暂停购买是公司财务决策，不直接等于 BTC 价格下跌——归因无法建立直接因果
播报时间代替公司公告实际发布时间——公司可能在美国盘前就已发布公告
单一信息源，但公司公告本身是可靠的一手来源
samples.manual_review_notes: Strategy 的公司财务决策是可信的公开信息。此事件属于 ETF/机构类别，价格影响可能相对温和。如果后续能获取美国公司公告的官方发布时间，可提高 t0 精度。

samples.title: WTI原油期货日内暴跌6%
samples.raw_summary: WTI 原油期货价格日内暴跌约 6%，引发风险资产普遍承压。宏观层面可能对 BTC、ETH 等加密资产产生联动影响。
samples.source_quality_status: 单来源，宏观事件可独立验证
samples.price_provider_plan: MACRO EVENT — do NOT request WTI price. Only backfill BTC and ETH using Binance Kline 1m (BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT). Macro asset price backfill is out of scope for v1.
samples.price_interval_plan: 1m for BTC and ETH benchmarks only. WTI: no price backfill planned.
known_limitations: WTI 原油是宏观资产，不在 Signal Spine 的资产回填范围内
不请求 WTI 价格数据——只回填 BTC 和 ETH 的观察窗口
原油暴跌对 BTC/ETH 的影响是间接的，归因分析无法隔离原油因素的独立影响
播报时间代替原油实际暴跌的发生时间——暴跌可能在播报前数小时就已开始
单一来源，但原油价格是公开市场数据可独立验证
samples.manual_review_notes: 此样本的现有人工结论已正确处理——列为观察而非风险提示。宏观事件的归因非常 challenging，v1 仅记录 BTC/ETH 的价格窗口以供参考。如果后续需要 WTI 价格数据，需要扩展 price_backfill 以支持非加密资产数据源。

field_descriptions.sample_id: Unique identifier for this sample (w1_001 through w1_005)
field_descriptions.notion_page_id: Notion page ID for the original event entry (null = not yet linked)
field_descriptions.title: Short human-readable event title
field_descriptions.raw_summary: Original broadcast summary preserving the source's wording
field_descriptions.broadcast_time_utc: The time the event was broadcast/reported by the source (used as t0)
field_descriptions.event_time_utc: The actual time the event occurred (null = unavailable)
field_descriptions.t0_basis: What timestamp is used as t0 for price backfill
field_descriptions.subject_asset: The primary asset mentioned in the event
field_descriptions.observation_assets: Assets to observe for price impact
field_descriptions.benchmark_assets: Benchmark assets for abnormal return calculation
field_descriptions.existing_decision: Original human decision (观察/仅风险提示/禁止/丢弃)
field_descriptions.price_provider_plan: Which price provider and data source to use for this asset
field_descriptions.manual_review_notes: Free-text notes for the reviewer or downstream consumer
